name: Muffuletta
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine chopped green salad olives, black olives, celery, and 1 tsp of Tabasco sauce.
2. Cut the French bread in half across its width. Remove some of the soft interior from each half.
3. In a small bowl, mix olive oil with the remaining Tabasco sauce.
4. Brush this mixture inside each piece of bread.
5. Fill the bottom halves with the olive and celery mixture.
6. Top with slices of salami, ham, and provolone cheese.
7. Place the top half of the bread on each sandwich.
8. Cut the sandwiches into quarters.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
Courtesy: McIlhenny Co.
